files.patch:
@@ -238,0 +238,10 @@
+### Plugin `cacerts`
+
+Options
+:   `--cacerts=`*alias*\[`,`*alias*\]\*
+
+Description
+:   Create the `cacerts` keystore in the output image with the certificates of
+    the specified aliases only. *alias* is the name of an alias in the
+    `cacerts` keystore.
+
